author: Bryn
description: Highlight words from custom JSON wordbooks across notes and PDFs. Sidebar tracks learning progress with mastery/ignore toggles. Supports local fuzzy search and AI-powered definitions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Bryn
manifest.description: Highlight words from custom JSON wordbooks across notes and PDFs. Sidebar tracks learning progress with mastery/ignore toggles. Supports local fuzzy search and AI-powered definitions.
manifest.name: Simple Wordbook

name: Simple Wordbook

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.6.3...1.6.4

- 新增内置的发音语言删除防呆（回退语言en不可删除）
- 优化发音语言删除弹窗的显示

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.6.2...1.6.3

新增“**朗读选中的文本**”命令（建议绑定快捷键调用命令，使用命令面板可能会丢失选中的文本）
- 在编辑器中选中文本后触发发音，语言识别优先级：默认发音语言 → "en"
- 单词卡片、悬停弹窗中选中文本后触发发音。语言识别优先级：lang → 默认发音语言 → "en"

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.6.1...1.6.2

- 高亮范围新增 * 用于匹配仓库根目录下的所有文件（不含子文件夹）
- 单词新增「lang」字段，用于匹配发音语言
- 更丰富的发音选择

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.6.0...1.6.1

- 去除js中重复的样式定义
- 修复txt导出后因别名为空，不导出别名字段后，导致的列不同无法导入anki的问题（现别名为空，填空字符串占位）
- 侧边栏定位清空搜索框在定位单词卡片
- 侧边栏卡片搜索自动按优先级（学习 → 掌握 → 忽略）查找匹配切换标签页
- 新增md/pdf高亮透明度可调节
- 新增单词卡片可单独导出为markdown文件

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.5.9...1.6.0

- 新增API密钥存储加密模式（官方/本地）
- 修复了从1.5.5版本开始，设置界面缺少“跟随卡片颜色”开关的问题

- 新增“新建单词本”按钮
- 高亮颜色新增“无”选项
- 优化部分样式等

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.5.0...1.5.2

- 优化悬停弹窗切换标签页时，弹窗大小及位置逻辑

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Bin-T/obsidian-simple-wordbook/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1

- 修复文档单词过多，悬停弹窗无法定位到侧边栏卡片的BUG
- 移动端设置界面优化

releases.author: Bin-T
releases.description:
一款为 [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md/) 设计的单词/短语高亮与学习管理插件。  
它能自动高亮您笔记中出现在自定义词库里的单词，并提供侧边栏、查词面板、掌握状态追踪、AI 辅助查询等完整学习工具链。
